evaluation.summary: The experiment failed to run because the required 'li' function could not be imported, preventing any scientific conclusion.
next_directions: Resolve the import error by checking SciPy version or using an alternative implementation of the required function.
Verify the availability and correct name of the LDAB-related function in the current SciPy release.
Implement a fallback or custom implementation of the LDAB correction factor and re-run the experiments to obtain valid results.
